projects.title: SprintifAI
projects.description: SprintifAI is an enterprise productivity platform that turns every meeting into measurable business outcomes. It captures discussions, extracts decisions, assigns tasks with deadlines, and syncs everything to your team's calendar.

projects.title: Bosla
projects.description: An AI-powered learning platform that analyzes each student's learning style, strengths, and weaknesses to generate personalized programming learning paths. Interactive lessons and adaptive resources help students master concepts faster and more effectively.

projects.title: Jawamk
projects.description: Corporate website for Jawamk, a graphic design and digital marketing agency with offices across Saudi Arabia, UAE, Oman, and Egypt — featuring a bilingual (EN/AR) interface, project showcase, blog, and services pages.

projects.title: Skyra
projects.description: NASA Space Apps 2025 project — an AI-powered weather assistant that evaluates real-time NASA data to help users plan outdoor activities safely, with smart suggestions for better scheduling.

projects.title: Mohdmimy
projects.description: A modern website for a graphic designer, showcasing his work and services, to easily display his portfolio and attract potential clients.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard
projects.description: A sleek and intuitive admin dashboard built with React and Material UI, designed to provide seamless data management and insightful analytics for businesses. It features a responsive layout, interactive Nivo charts, a full calendar, and data grids, allowing administrators to efficiently monitor key performance indicators, manage user accounts, and visualize data trends in real-time.

projects.title: Sirx
projects.description: A cryptocurrency news platform for Sirx featuring live market updates, a news blog, services overview, and customer testimonials.

projects.title: Finto App
projects.description: Finto App is designed to help users track their income and expenses, visualize their spending trends over time, and gain insights into their financial habits. It features a clean interface for logging transactions, categorizing expenses, and viewing detailed reports and charts that give a clear overview of financial health.

projects.title: ELITE App
projects.description: A modern e-commerce mobile app built with React Native, Expo, and Supabase — featuring product browsing, cart management, secure authentication, and offline-ready local storage for a smooth shopping experience.

projects.title: Old Portfolio
projects.description: My old portfolio website, built with React, Sass and Framer Motion, showcasing my projects and experience at that time.

projects.title: Matger Electronics
projects.description: An electronics e-commerce site with a product catalog, store locator map, blog, and testimonials — built as an ITI team project with React, Material UI, and Redux Toolkit.

projects.title: Food Delivery
projects.description: A food delivery web application built with React and Redux Toolkit, designed to provide users with a seamless and engaging ordering experience.

projects.title: Arab Accountant Blog
projects.description: A bilingual accounting knowledge hub with SEO-optimized articles, social sharing, and service pages for Arab accountants and finance professionals.

projects.title: E-commerce
projects.description: An e-commerce web application built with React, Bootstrap and Redux Toolkit with persisted cart state, designed to provide users with a seamless and engaging shopping experience.

description: Engineered an ERP system and internal dashboards serving 300+ organizations using React, Shadcn/UI, and React Query, streamlining employee workflows and daily operations.
Designed and implemented reusable, accessible UI components and optimized data fetching with React Query, cutting redundant network requests and improving page performance platform-wide.
Delivered features across multiple React applications within Agile sprints, collaborating with designers and developers to meet project deadlines.
Developed the product catalog, cart, and checkout flows for a collaborative e-commerce application using React, Material UI, and Redux Toolkit.
Architected global state management for cart and authentication with Redux Toolkit and integrated an interactive store-locator map with Leaflet.
Implemented responsive UI features and resolved frontend defects across real-world React and JavaScript projects.
Strengthened problem-solving and project-structuring skills through hands-on work on production-style frontend tasks.
